achievements.title: You're George McFly!
achievements.description: Survive the trip to Lou's Cafe. Good job.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Are You Saying My Mom Has The Hots For Me?
achievements.description: Survive the trip to the High School.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Do You Mind If We Park For A While?
achievements.description: Survive the trip to the Enchant Under the Sea Dance.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: You'll Be Back In Time!
achievements.description: Finish the game, whether you make it to 1985 or not!
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Saturday, November 12th, 10-oh-4 PM
achievements.description: Successfully travel BACK to the FUTURE!
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Give Me a Pepsi Free
achievements.description: Complete the mini-game at Lou's Cafe.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: If You Wanna Pepsi Pal, Yer Gonna Pay for It
achievements.description: Get a PERFECT 99 score at Lou's Cafe!
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Isn't He A Dream Boat?
achievements.description: Complete the mini-game at the High School.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: That's the POWER of Love!
achievements.description: Get a PERFECT 99 score at the High School!
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: You Know That New Sound You're Looking For?
achievements.description: Complete the mini-game at the Dance, with new music!
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: I Think You Mean Johnny Be GREAT, Scott
achievements.description: Never miss ANY music note at the dance!
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Marty! Take This Bowling Ball!
achievements.description: Pick up a bowling ball for the first time.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Hey Kid, Let Me Borrow Your Skateboard
achievements.description: Pick up a skateboard for the first time.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The Armed Mobile Time Devourer
achievements.description: After cafe, finish entire stage with skateboard and bowling ball.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Jump, JUMP! For My Love
achievements.description: After cafe, jump at the end of a stage to get 900 points.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Extreme Street Skate Bowling
achievements.description: Successfully strike a set of bowling pins.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Consider the Repercussions of Time Travel!
achievements.description: Finish the cafe with less than 20,000 points.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: You Must Not Leave This House
achievements.description: Finish the school with less than 40,000 points.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: You Must Not See or Talk to Anybody
achievements.description: Finish the dance with less than 70,000 points.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: And Most Definitely Do Not Date Your Parents
achievements.description: Drive off in the DeLorean with less than 100,000 points.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Knowing Too Much About Your Own Destiny
achievements.description: After the cafe, finish a stage without dying.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Roads? Where We're Gaming, We Don't Need ROADS.
achievements.description: Future or Bust, finish the game without dying once!
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Starting the Butterfly Effect
achievements.description: Earn 25,000 points!
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Perturbed Space-Time Continuum
achievements.description: Earn 50,000 points!
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Creating a Time Paradox
achievements.description: Earn 75,000 points!
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Committing Grand Dad Paradox
achievements.description: Earn 100,000 points!
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Lament of the Former Kingpin, Marty McFly
achievements.description: After the school, complete an entire stage without the bowling ball.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Quantum Foam Makes Me Roam
achievements.description: After the school, complete an entire stage without a skateboard.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Don't Run OUTTA TIME
achievements.description: After the school, collect 30 clocks in a single stage!
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: If Only I Had More Time
achievements.description: Collect 100 total clocks!
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: I Got All The Time I Want
achievements.description: Collect 250 total clocks!
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: I GOT A TIME MACHINE
achievements.description: Collect 500 total clocks!
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: So Precious, Little Time
achievements.description: After the school, never shoot a clock during a single stage!
